'''Exotac Arms''', also known as '''Exotac Labs''', was a weapons manufacturing corporation. They specialized in civilian-use weaponry. One of their experimental weapon designs was the [[EXP-7(a) Predator]] hunting [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].

{{Company-stub}}
